tool_args.label: SBS has brought more reliable service and safer streets

payload.claim_text: SBS has brought: 10-30% faster bus speeds • About 10% increase in ridership • More reliable service • Customer satisfaction of 95% • Safer streets / reduction in crashes

tool_args.label: Alternative 1 most beneficial for 25,000 daily bus riders

payload.claim_text: Most beneficial for 25,000 daily bus riders • Straightforward design for drivers • Traffic works eastbound at Sheridan Ave • Traffic would experience more delays westbound at Sheridan Ave

tool_args.label: Alternative 2 beneficial for 25,000 daily bus riders with no significant traffic impacts

payload.claim_text: Beneficial for 25,000 daily bus riders • No significant traffic impacts • Addresses boarding issue in front of courts
Improve bus speeds • Address bus boarding and vehicle organization issues in front of courts • Improve pedestrian conditions • Maintain and better organize traffic flow
